name: @logbrew/browser
description: Browser error, page-view, action, network, and fetch transport helpers for the public LogBrew JavaScript SDK.

scripts.test: node --check index.js && node --check index.cjs && node --check beacon-transport.js && node --check beacon-transport.cjs && node --check persistence.js && node --check persistence.cjs && node --check trace-context.js && node --check trace-context.cjs && node --check examples/index.mjs && node --check examples/readme-example.mjs && node --check examples/real-user-smoke.mjs && node --test test/*.test.mjs
